digest.component_or_area: audit read layer (rebar.audit) over plan/completion/code-review sidecars
propositions: Provide a single documented read surface returning a ticket's full retained review history and resolving its associated code reviews.
audit_trail(ticket_id) returns a typed dict with keys ticket, plan_reviews, completion, code_reviews; plan_reviews and code_reviews are newest-first lists, empty when none.
completion is a CompletionRecord (attestation and sidecar independently nullable from disjoint sources) and is None only when both are absent.
Add all_review_results history enumerators to plan-review and code-review sidecar modules, walking REVIEW_RESULT events newest-first and schema-tolerant.
Resolve code reviews via inbound relates_to links from code_review tickets, reusing existing linkage without new mechanism.
Expose the aggregator as a library function, a rebar audit show CLI command, and a read-only MCP audit_trail tool available under REBAR_MCP_READONLY.
